queries.question: What sales managers have a hybrid work arrangement and what marketing specialists are the same?
queries.sql:
SELECT Sales_Manager.name
FROM Sales_Manager
WHERE Sales_Manager.working_arrangement = "Hybrid"
UNION
SELECT Marketing_Specialist.name
FROM Marketing_Specialist
WHERE Marketing_Specialist.working_arrangement = "Hybrid"

queries.question: Provide sales managers and marketing specialists with a hybrid work arrangement.
queries.sql:
SELECT Sales_Manager.name
FROM Sales_Manager
UNION
SELECT Marketing_Specialist.name
FROM Marketing_Specialist
WHERE Marketing_Specialist.working_arrangement = "Hybrid"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Provide sales managers and marketing specialists with a hybrid work arrangement.
